changes.content: // WorkspaceState represents the lifecycle state of a workspace.
// StateCreating means bootstrap is in progress. Operations block until Ready.
// StateReady means bootstrap completed. All operations proceed normally.
// non-nil when bootstrap failed (workspace will be removed from map)
// closed when State transitions out of Creating
// true after successful bootstrap via FinishBootstrap
// GetWorkspace returns the workspace for the given ID, or nil if not found.
// WaitForReady blocks until the workspace reaches Ready state or the context
// is cancelled. Returns nil if the workspace is ready, context error on
// timeout/cancellation, or ErrWorkspaceNotFound if the workspace doesn't exist
// or was removed after a failed bootstrap.
// Re-check: workspace may have been removed after failed bootstrap.
// ErrWorkspaceNotFound is returned when a workspace does not exist or was
// CreateWorkspaceForBootstrap creates a workspace in Creating state.
// Returns (metadata, true, nil) when the workspace needs bootstrap.
// Returns (metadata, false, nil) when the workspace is already bootstrapped.
// After bootstrap completes, the caller must call FinishBootstrap to transition
// the workspace to Ready (on success) or remove it (on failure).
// Ready but not bootstrapped (created by NewServer at startup).
// Transition back to Creating so bootstrap can run.
// FinishBootstrap completes the bootstrap lifecycle for a workspace.
// On success (bootstrapErr == nil), transitions to Ready.
// On failure, removes the workspace so it can be retried.
// This is set internally when CreateWorkspace is called.
// Returns proto.DefaultWorkspacePath if the default workspace hasn't been created yet.

new_lines: // WorkspaceState represents the lifecycle state of a workspace.
// StateCreating means bootstrap is in progress. Operations block until Ready.
// StateReady means bootstrap completed. All operations proceed normally.
// credentialURLPattern matches URLs with embedded credentials (e.g., https://user:pass@host/...).
// redactCredentials replaces credentials in URLs within an error string.
// pathInfo maps an absolute path to its workspace and repo.
// Workspace represents a workspace containing multiple repositories.
RootPath    string // Base path for workspace (e.g., /workspaces/default)
Env         map[string]string             // per-workspace env defaults (from workspace/create)
StateErr     error         // non-nil when bootstrap failed (workspace will be removed from map)
ready        chan struct{} // closed when State transitions out of Creating
bootstrapped bool          // true after successful bootstrap via FinishBootstrap
// ManagedRepo represents a git repository within a workspace.
RelativePath string // Relative to workspace root
// WorkspaceManager manages git-backed directories for sboxd.
// It handles initialization (cloning), saving (commit+push), and credential updates.
// NewWorkspaceManager creates a new workspace manager.
// DefaultWorkspacePath returns the root path of the default workspace.
// Returns proto.DefaultWorkspacePath if the default workspace hasn't been created yet.
// GetWorkspace returns the workspace for the given ID, or nil if not found.
// WaitForReady blocks until the workspace reaches Ready state or the context
// is cancelled. Returns nil if the workspace is ready, context error on
// timeout/cancellation, or ErrWorkspaceNotFound if the workspace doesn't exist
// or was removed after a failed bootstrap.
func (m *WorkspaceManager) WaitForReady(ctx context.Context, wsID proto.WorkspaceID) error {
// Re-check: workspace may have been removed after failed bootstrap.
// ErrWorkspaceNotFound is returned when a workspace does not exist or was
// CreateWorkspaceForBootstrap creates a workspace in Creating state.
// Returns (metadata, true, nil) when the workspace needs bootstrap.
// Returns (metadata, false, nil) when the workspace is already bootstrapped.
// After bootstrap completes, the caller must call FinishBootstrap to transition
// the workspace to Ready (on success) or remove it (on failure).
func (m *WorkspaceManager) CreateWorkspaceForBootstrap(wsID proto.WorkspaceID, rootPath string) (*proto.WorkspaceMetadata, bool, error) {
return nil, false, fmt.Errorf("workspace %s is already being created", wsID)
// Ready but not bootstrapped (created by NewServer at startup).
// Transition back to Creating so bootstrap can run.
return nil, false, fmt.Errorf("create workspace directory %s: %w", rootPath, err)
// FinishBootstrap completes the bootstrap lifecycle for a workspace.
// On success (bootstrapErr == nil), transitions to Ready.
// On failure, removes the workspace so it can be retried.
// CreateWorkspace creates a workspace with the given ID and root path.
// It creates the directory on disk via os.MkdirAll, then registers it in the
// workspace manager. Returns an error if the directory cannot be created (fail-fast).
// If the workspace already exists, it returns the existing metadata.
// The optional env map stores per-workspace env defaults for prompt sessions.
func (m *WorkspaceManager) CreateWorkspace(wsID proto.WorkspaceID, rootPath string, env ...map[string]string) (proto.WorkspaceID, *proto.WorkspaceMetadata, error) {
